name: Monthly Collection Report
query:
SELECT
    MCT.year AS 'Year:data:100',
    MCT.month AS 'Month:Data:100',
    MCT.sales_person AS "Sales Person:Link/Sales Person",
    MCTD.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
    MCTD.customer_name AS "Customer Name:Data:240",
    MCTD.outstanding_amount as 'Outstanding',
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(PE.total_allocated_amount), 0) FROM `tabPayment Entry` PE
        WHERE PE.docstatus=1 AND PE.party = MCTD.customer AND PE.payment_type = "Receive"
        AND MONTHNAME(PE.posting_date) = MCT.month AND YEAR(PE.posting_date) = MCT.year
    ) +
    
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(JEA.credit_in_account_currency), 0) FROM `tabJournal Entry` JE
        INNER JOIN `tabJournal Entry Account` JEA ON JE.name = JEA.parent 
        WHERE JE.docstatus=1 AND JEA.party = MCTD.customer AND JEA.party_type = "Customer"
        AND MONTHNAME(JE.posting_date) = MCT.month AND YEAR(JE.posting_date) = MCT.year 
    ) AS "On Account:Currency:180",
    MCTD.1st_overdue_amount as '1st Overdue Amount',
    MCTD.30th_overdue_amount as '30th Overdue Amount',
    MCTD.amount AS "Collection Target Amount:currency:180",
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(PE.total_allocated_amount), 0) FROM `tabPayment Entry` PE
        WHERE PE.docstatus=1 AND PE.party = MCTD.customer AND PE.payment_type = "Receive"
        AND MONTHNAME(PE.posting_date) = MCT.month AND YEAR(PE.posting_date) = MCT.year
    ) +
    
    (
         SELECT IFNULL(SUM(PE.unallocated_amount), 0) FROM `tabPayment Entry` PE
        WHERE PE.docstatus=1 AND PE.party = MCTD.customer AND PE.payment_type = "Receive"
        AND MONTHNAME(PE.posting_date) = MCT.month AND YEAR(PE.posting_date) = MCT.year
    ) +
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(JEA.credit_in_account_currency), 0) FROM `tabJournal Entry` JE
        INNER JOIN `tabJournal Entry Account` JEA ON JE.name = JEA.parent 
        WHERE JE.docstatus=1 AND JEA.party = MCTD.customer AND JEA.party_type = "Customer"
        AND MONTHNAME(JE.posting_date) = MCT.month AND YEAR(JE.posting_date) = MCT.year
    ) AS "Actual Collection Amount:Currency:180"
FROM
    `tabMonthly Collection Target` AS MCT
INNER JOIN
    `tabMonthly Collection Target Details` AS MCTD ON MCT.name = MCTD.parent
WHERE
    MCT.month = %(month)s AND MCT.year = %(year)s AND MCT.company = %(company)s AND MCT.docstatus = 1
ORDER BY
    MCTD.customer_name
